name: Deltek Ajera AEC Project Accounting API
what_it_does: Deltek Ajera cloud project accounting REST API for small to mid-size architecture and engineering firms with integrated project management, time and expense, billing, and financial reporting. Enables AI agents to manage project and phase setup for automated AEC project accounting initialization, handle time entry and expense submission for project cost allocation automation, access project billing and invoice generation for professional services revenue management, retrieve project financial performance and profitability metrics for firm business intelligence, manage staff utilization and project budget tracking for resource efficiency monitoring, handle accounts receivable and cash management for AEC firm cash flow automation, access client and contact management for basic CRM integration, retrieve overhead and multiplier rate calculation for DCAA-compliant indirect cost billing, manage WBS and task tracking for project phase management, and integrate Ajera with Deltek Vantagepoint (for firms growing into full ERP), Payroll (ADP), and financial reporting platforms.
use_cases: Tracking project costs from small AEC finance agents
Automating billing from architectural firm agents
Managing utilization from engineering firm resource agents
Monitoring profitability from AEC principals agents
not_for: Large AEC firms needing full ERP (use Deltek Vantagepoint or BST Global)
General construction contractors (use Procore or Trimble Viewpoint)
Full HR, benefits, and talent management
best_when: A small to mid-size architecture, engineering, or environmental consulting firm (5-100 staff) wanting AI agents to automate project accounting, time and expense management, billing, and profitability tracking with a cloud-native AEC-specific system.
avoid_when: DCAA INDIRECT COST RATE ACCURACY FOR GOVERNMENT AEC: Automated overhead rate and indirect cost pool from Ajera used in government AEC billings must reflect actual incurred costs reconciled to DCAA-approved rates; automated provisional billing without annual rate reconciliation creates DCAA questioned cost. PERCENT-COMPLETE BILLING REVIEW REQUIRED: Automated invoice generation from Ajera project percent-complete data must be reviewed by project principal before client delivery; automated billing without principal review creates AE fee dispute and professional liability exposure. FAR UNALLOWABLE COST ENTRY SEGREGATION: Automated cost entries to Ajera for government AEC projects must flag FAR 31.205 unallowable costs at entry; automated cost allocation without unallowable segregation creates DCAA audit finding. Ajera-to-Vantagepoint migration path — fast-growing AEC firms outgrow Ajera and migrate to Deltek Vantagepoint; build automation with migration in mind and avoid deep Ajera-specific customization that cannot be ported to Vantagepoint.

auth.notes: Deltek Ajera uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Herndon, Virginia HQ (Deltek, Inc., Roper Technologies NASDAQ: ROP subsidiary). Ajera originally developed by Axium International, acquired by Deltek 2012. Cloud-based project accounting for small to mid-size AEC firms (5-100 employees). 4,000+ AEC firms. Entry-level Deltek product with migration path to Vantagepoint. Competes with BQE Core, Monograph, and Studio Designer for small AEC project accounting.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly or annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; cloud-native, no on-premise option
pricing.notes: Herndon VA. Deltek, Roper Technologies NASDAQ:ROP subsidiary. Ajera acquired from Axium 2012. 4,000+ small AEC firms. Per-user monthly cloud subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; financial data access throttled for data integrity

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Ajera has no webhook support; project billing, time entry posting, and payment events require scheduled polling; implement time-based polling aligned with AEC firm's weekly time entry and monthly billing cycle

API KEY ONLY — NO GRANULAR SCOPE CONTROL: Ajera API key provides broad access without OAuth scope granularity; automated agents using Ajera API key have access to all firm financial data; rotate API keys regularly and restrict to minimum-privilege service account

DCAA GOVERNMENT CONTRACT INDIRECT RATE ACCURACY: Automated overhead allocation using Ajera rates for government AEC billings must be reconciled to DCAA-approved provisional rates; automated billing using internal Ajera rates without DCAA rate verification creates cost questioned and potential contract modification

Small firm API investment — Ajera is a small-firm product with limited API development investment compared to Vantagepoint; API feature coverage is narrower than enterprise Deltek products; validate that required data entities (specific project financial fields) are accessible via API before automation design

Migration readiness for growing firms — Ajera is designed for firms under 100 employees; automated workflows should be designed with Vantagepoint migration in mind; Deltek provides migration path and data export; avoid deep Ajera-specific automation that creates migration obstacles

Multiplier calculation and overhead rate review — automated Ajera multiplier and overhead rate calculation used in staff billing rates must be reviewed by principal annually; automated billing at stale multipliers without rate review creates under- or over-billing of professional services
agent_readiness.security_notes: AEC project accounting. SOC2. API key. US. Project financial and billing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AEC project accounting. SOC2. API key. US. Project financial and professional services billing data.
